question: Write down a string tokenizer function which receive a char array, its size and a char delimiter. Delimiter is a token on which you have to tokenize the string. Your function scan the array and stops when it find the first token in array and return the reference of the array before token. Your original string also modified by the second part of token and also its size. Think about function prototype. Input array and token both from user. Display all tokenized strings of original strings.
errors: Poor function name 'f' instead of descriptive 'myTokenizer'
Single letter variable names (s, t, sz, p, l, r, al) reducing readability
Poor code formatting with inconsistent spacing and indentation
No comments or documentation explaining function purpose
Inefficient character-by-character copying instead of memcpy/memmove
Multiple statements on single line reducing readability
Poor variable naming conventions throughout the code
Missing proper code organization and structure
